[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101010000 3
1 000000010 1
2 100001101 4
3 000010000 1
4 100001100 3
5 101000000 2
6 101010000 3
7 001000010 2
